text: Kayaking and canoeing, based at Dermot Water, just a few miles away from the centre.
Once the group get down there, they'll be initially given a briefing on the banking.
So they'll be taught how to hold and use a paddle and also have a look at the kayaks
or the canoes depending on what they're going out in.
They'll also be taught things like capsize drill.
Now a long time ago, people usually got made to capsize as soon as they got on the water.
This is just explained on the bank so if it was to happen, they know how to get out of
the boat and what to do whilst the instructor helps them back in.
